title: Text Formatting Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of HTML text formatting elements.

questions.question: Which tag is used for text that has strong importance and is usually bolded?
Which tag defines text that is emphasized (usually italicized)?
If you want to highlight text with a background color, which tag should you use?
Which tag is used to create subscript text (like in chemistry formulas)?
What is the result of using the <del> tag?
options: It removes the text entirely from the page.
It adds a strikethrough to indicate deleted text.
It underlines the text to show it is important.
It hides the text from screen readers.
